channel.title: Pages on bl7ck0ut
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on bl7ck0ut

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m one of those odd people who genuinely finds staring at assembly code strangely hypnotising. I’ve spent the last 5+ working in security, starting out in incident response before falling down the malware analysis rabbit hole.

Now, I’m pretty much interested in the malware analysis & reverse engineering side of things. I built this site to document what I’m learning along the way.

Also, feel free to get in touch via LinkedIn.
